sections.paragraph:
unused in Kal.

Piel, to exclaim, to cry out, Jud. 5:28 . (Aram. id.; specially used of joyful exclamations; found in the Targums for Hebr. הֵרִיעַ, רִנֵּן, Syr. also to blow a trumpet, ܝܘܽܒܳܒܳܐ the sound of a trumpet. Arabic أَبَّبَ id.; especially of a battle-cry or shout; comp. יֹובֵל)

Hence יֹובָב pr.n.
